name: Arcanoid Side Guns
description: Blast your way through the galaxy! Pilot your ship in this explosive Arcanoid-style game, but this time, youre armed. Destroy the overhead brick barriers with precise ball bounces and unleash your side guns to obliterate enemy spaceships and grab power-ups. Web Dev https://www.crazygames.org.es/ Can you clear the screen and survive the cosmic onslaught?
instructions: Mouse click or tap to play
